summary: CT-004: ToolCache (cache.ts) is production-quality LRU+TTL+dedup cache that is completely unwired — getOrCompute is @deprecated and never called
detail: cache.ts:30 — getOrCompute method annotated '@deprecated Not currently wired to any consumer. Kept for future tool-level caching use. Remove if still unused after next audit.' The Service is provided in AppLayer (app-runtime.ts:105) and yielded in registry.ts:189 but its methods (getOrCompute, invalidate, invalidateKey, stats) are NEVER called anywhere in the codebase. 8 tools already declare `cacheable: true` on their Def, but this flag is used only for semaphore routing (readSemaphore=10 vs writeSemaphore=3). No results are cached.
